languages.text: "Эти трое обречены. Если вы велите прекратить эксперимент — я беспрекословно подчинюсь и прекращу их жизненные функции. Но эта жертва будет напрасна. Если вы позволите мне дойти до конца, то один из них выживет — нет, он станет чем-то большим, чем был до этого".

"These three are doomed. If you tell me to stop the experiment, I will obey without question and terminate their life functions. But then their sacrifice will have been in vain. If you allow me to see this through to the end, one of them will survive — no, he will become something greater than he was before."
languages.original_text: "Эти трое обречены. Если вы велите прекратить эксперимент — я беспрекословно подчинюсь и прекращу их жизненные функции. Но эта жертва будет напрасна. Если вы позволите мне дойти до конца, то один из них выживет — нет, он станет чем-то большим, чем был до этого".

traits.locale_text: "These three are doomed. If you tell me to stop the experiment, I will obey without question and terminate their life functions. But then their sacrifice will have been in vain. If you allow me to see this through to the end, one of them will survive — no, he will become something greater than he was before."

"These three are doomed. If you tell me to stop the experiment, I will obey without question and terminate their life functions. But then their sacrifice will have been in vain. If you allow me to see this through to the end, one of them will survive — no, he will become something greater than he was before."

"These three are doomed. If you tell me to stop the experiment, I will obey without question and terminate their life functions. But then their sacrifice will have been in vain. If you allow me to see this through to the end, one of them will survive — no, he will become something greater than he was before."

languages.text: 「この３人は死を待つ。実験を中止しろと言われれば、私は迷わず命の機能を停止する。しかし、彼らの犠牲は無駄になる。最後まで見届けさせてくれれば、１人は生き残る。いや、彼らを超えた存在になる」
languages.original_text: "These three are doomed. If you tell me to stop the experiment, I will obey without question and terminate their life functions. But then their sacrifice will have been in vain. If you allow me to see this through to the end, one of them will survive — no, he will become something greater than he was before."

traits.locale_text: 「この３人は死を待つ。実験を中止しろと言われれば、私は迷わず命の機能を停止する。しかし、彼らの犠牲は無駄になる。最後まで見届けさせてくれれば、１人は生き残る。いや、彼らを超えた存在になる。」

languages.text: “这三个人必死无疑。如果您要求我停止实验，我将无条件服从，并终止他们的生命机能。但如此这般，他们的牺牲就会白费。如果您允许我将实验进行到底，其中一人就会存活——不，他会超越其本身，成为更伟大的存在。”
languages.original_text: "These three are doomed. If you tell me to stop the experiment, I will obey without question and terminate their life functions. But then their sacrifice will have been in vain. If you allow me to see this through to the end, one of them will survive — no, he will become something greater than he was before."

traits.locale_text: “这三个人必死无疑。如果您要求我停止实验，我将无条件服从，并终止他们的生命机能。但如此这般，他们的牺牲就会白费。如果您允许我将实验进行到底，其中一人就会存活——不，他会超越其本身，成为更伟大的存在。”

languages.text: «Estos tres están condenados. Si me ordena detener el experimento, obedeceré sin ninguna queja y desconectaré sus funciones vitales. Pero, en ese caso, sus sacrificios serían en vano. Si me permite continuar hasta el final, uno de ellos sobrevivirá... no, se convertirá en algo superior a lo que era».
languages.original_text: "These three are doomed. If you tell me to stop the experiment, I will obey without question and terminate their life functions. But then their sacrifice will have been in vain. If you allow me to see this through to the end, one of them will survive — no, he will become something greater than he was before."

traits.locale_text: «Estos tres están condenados. Si me ordena detener el experimento, obedeceré sin ninguna queja y desconectaré sus funciones vitales. Pero, en ese caso, sus sacrificios serían en vano. Si me permite continuar hasta el final, uno de ellos sobrevivirá... no, se convertirá en algo superior a lo que era».

languages.text: "Diese drei hier sind verloren. Wenn Ihr mir befehlt, das Experiment zu beenden, werde ich gehorchen und ihre Lebensfunktionen abschalten. Allerdings war ihr Opfer dann umsonst. Gestattet Ihr mir, das Experiment zu beenden, wird einer von ihnen überleben ... nein, er wird etwas Größeres sein als zuvor."
languages.original_text: "These three are doomed. If you tell me to stop the experiment, I will obey without question and terminate their life functions. But then their sacrifice will have been in vain. If you allow me to see this through to the end, one of them will survive — no, he will become something greater than he was before."

traits.locale_text: "Diese drei hier sind verloren. Wenn Ihr mir befehlt, das Experiment zu beenden, werde ich gehorchen und ihre Lebensfunktionen abschalten. Allerdings war ihr Opfer dann umsonst. Gestattet Ihr mir, das Experiment zu beenden, wird einer von ihnen überleben ... nein, er wird etwas Größeres sein als zuvor."

languages.text: « Ces trois hommes sont condamnés. Si vous m'ordonnez de cesser mon expérience, j'obéirai sans discuter et mettrai fin à leurs fonctions vitales. Cependant, leur sacrifice sera vain. Si, au contraire, vous me permettez d'achever l'opération, l'un d'entre eux survivra. Non, il transcendera sa nature pour devenir quelque chose de plus grand. »
languages.original_text: "These three are doomed. If you tell me to stop the experiment, I will obey without question and terminate their life functions. But then their sacrifice will have been in vain. If you allow me to see this through to the end, one of them will survive — no, he will become something greater than he was before."

traits.locale_text: « Ces trois hommes sont condamnés. Si vous m'ordonnez de cesser mon expérience, j'obéirai sans discuter et mettrai fin à leurs fonctions vitales. Cependant, leur sacrifice sera vain. Si, au contraire, vous me permettez d'achever l'opération, l'un d'entre eux survivra. Non, il transcendera sa nature pour devenir quelque chose de plus grand. »

languages.text: "Bu üçü ölüme mahkûm. Eğer bana deneyi durdurmamı söylerseniz hiç itiraz etmeden itaat edecek ve yaşam fonksiyonlarını sonlandıracağım. Ancak o zaman fedakârlıkları boşa gitmiş olacak. Eğer bunu sonuna kadar görmeme izin verirseniz içlerinden biri hayatta kalacak. Hayır, eskisinden daha büyük bir şeye dönüşecek."
languages.original_text: "These three are doomed. If you tell me to stop the experiment, I will obey without question and terminate their life functions. But then their sacrifice will have been in vain. If you allow me to see this through to the end, one of them will survive — no, he will become something greater than he was before."

traits.locale_text: "Bu üçü ölüme mahkûm. Eğer bana deneyi durdurmamı söylerseniz hiç itiraz etmeden itaat edecek ve yaşam fonksiyonlarını sonlandıracağım. Ancak o zaman fedakârlıkları boşa gitmiş olacak. Eğer bunu sonuna kadar görmeme izin verirseniz içlerinden biri hayatta kalacak. Hayır, eskisinden daha büyük bir şeye dönüşecek."
